name: compilence
description: Analyze our Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions data, check compliance with TCFD framework, and generate an executive summary with peer benchmarks

steps.name: Analyze Emissions Data
steps.description: Extract and analyze Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions data from the provided documentation.

steps.name: Detect TCFD Framework
steps.description: Identify and extract TCFD framework requirements and disclosure elements.

steps.name: Verify TCFD Compliance
steps.description: Check emissions data and disclosures against TCFD framework requirements for compliance.

steps.name: Benchmark Peer Performance
steps.description: Compare emissions performance against industry peers and benchmarks.

steps.name: Search Regulatory Context
steps.description: Retrieve relevant EU CSRD requirements and guidance for emissions reporting.

steps.name: Generate Executive Summary
steps.description: Create comprehensive executive summary including emissions analysis, compliance status, and peer benchmarks.
